name: Carl Andre

acts.description: Wife and artist Ana Mendieta fell from their 34th-floor apartment in 1985; Andre was tried for murder and acquitted

behavior_summary: Wife Ana Mendieta died after falling from their apartment window. Andre was tried for second-degree murder and acquitted in 1988. He claimed she jumped; the art world never fully recovered the conversation.

art.summary: Pioneering minimalist sculptor whose floor-level grid works redefined sculpture's relationship to space. Ana Mendieta was also a major artist whose career he outlived.

verdict.blurb: His wife, also a major artist, fell out of their apartment window. He was acquitted. Her career ended; his continued. The art world has mostly preferred not to dwell on the arithmetic.
